reviews.comment:
Local limpio u ordenado, atención en playa eficiente. Tienen mercado pago. Recomendable como parada final antes de llegar a CABA

(Translated by Google)
Clean and tidy premises, efficient service on the beach. They accept Mercado Pago. Recommended as a final stop before arriving in Buenos Aires.

reviews.comment:
Los baños súper limpios y lindos. La atención de la empleada del shopp muy mala, sin ganas de vender ni de preparar comidas. El resto todo normal. Buena ubicación. Es Full la YPF.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were super clean and nice. The shop employee's service was very poor; she had no desire to sell or prepare food. Everything else was fine. Good location. It's a full-service YPF gas station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13657899365243523321/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtM2NEOWR3EAE
